mapper.select: SELECT ID, APPLICATION_NO, APPLICATION_TITLE, APPLICATION_TYPE_CODE, APPLICATION_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CODE, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_NAME, REMARK, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, STATUS, APPROVAL_REMARK, APPROVAL_BY, APPROVAL_BY_NAME, APPROVAL_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION ( ID, APPLICATION_NO, APPLICATION_TITLE, APPLICATION_TYPE_CODE, APPLICATION_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CODE, FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_NAME, REMARK, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applicationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fixedServiceCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fixedServiceCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION
APPLICATION_NO = #{applicationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPLICATION_TITLE = #{applicationTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPLICATION_TYPE_CODE = #{applicationTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPLICATION_TYPE_NAME = #{applicationTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CODE = #{fixedServiceCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FIXED_SERVICE_CATEGORY_NAME = #{fixedServiceCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPROVAL_REMARK = #{approvalRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPROVAL_REMARK = NULL,
APPROVAL_BY = #{approvalBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPROVAL_BY = NULL,
APPROVAL_BY_NAME = #{approvalByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPROVAL_BY_NAME = NULL,
APPROVAL_TIME = #{approvalTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
APPROVAL_TIME = NULL,
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
